name: Uniview Device Type Check
description: Checks Uniview NVR-labeled devices and reclassifies IPC cameras as camera nodes, then locks them from module updates.
author: System

inputs.name: targets
inputs.label: Target NVRs
inputs.description: Select NVR devices, or leave empty to check every NVR in the current site.

inputs.name: lock_camera_nodes
inputs.label: Lock IPC camera nodes
inputs.description: When an IPC device is detected, lock the node so OUI/module updates cannot change it back.

inputs.name: override_locked
inputs.label: Check locked nodes
inputs.description: Normally locked devices are skipped. Enable only when intentionally correcting locked NVR rows.

outputs.name: updated
outputs.description: Number of NVR rows changed to camera.
